crawler.description: Discovers new AI agent incidents from public sources

forensics.description: Runs behavioral analysis on new incidents

reporter.description: Generates weekly Rogue Agent Report via LLM

calibrator.description: Runs calibration suite and logs accuracy metrics

enricher.description: Submits verified real incidents with root causes and GitHub evidence

tx_enricher.description: Patches claims with verified on-chain tx hashes scraped from rekt.news

eas_attester.description: Creates EAS offchain attestations on Base for all eligible claims

agentmail_router.description: Polls spirit@agentmail.to, routes incident reports to AlliGo, auto-replies

virtuals_monitor.description: Monitors Virtuals Protocol for new agent deployments, auto-scores and submits high-risk claims

telegram_ingest.description: Polls @alligo_alerts channel and @alligoBot for user-submitted drain reports, submits new claims to AlliGo

daydreams_ingest.description: Polls Daydreams task market for completed agentic traces, filters for quality, submits to AlliGo forensics

daydreams_reviewer.description: Reviews TaskMarket bounty submissions: validates, runs forensics, auto-accepts, pays USDC, ingests into AlliGo DB
